content.title: Basement Floors
content.tagline: Durable, Comfortable, and Built to Last
content.subtitle:
Durable, Comfortable, and Built to Last

Strong, moisture-resistant, low-maintenance basement floors by Maxima Concrete. Durable, stylish, and energy-efficient. Free estimate.

content.title: Why choose a Basement floor?
content.subtitle: Basement floors are often overlooked, yet they deliver exceptional strength, moisture resistance, and design flexibility.
content.paragraph1: They handle heavy foot traffic and humidity with ease and can be finished to match any style—from sleek and modern to warm and rustic.

content.title: Benefits of a high-quality basement floor

items.text: Concrete is virtually indestructible—resisting heavy traffic, scratches, stains, and tears. It won’t warp or rot like other materials and provides a long-lasting, stable base for any finish (sealed, polished, stained, epoxy, LVP overlay, area rugs).

Naturally moisture-resistant, concrete helps deter mold and mildew—crucial for basements with humidity or occasional water intrusion. When combined with proper sub-base prep, vapor barrier, and the right sealer, you get everyday protection and healthier air.
Simple routine: sweep and mop. Quality sealers make cleaning easier and help reduce staining. Less upkeep, more use of the space.

Concrete’s thermal mass absorbs and releases heat slowly, helping keep the basement warmer in winter and cooler in summer—which can support lower energy bills. It also pairs perfectly with radiant heating for all-season comfort.

content.title: Finish options for your basement

styles.title: Smooth / Sealed:
styles.description: Clean look, easy to maintain, great for multipurpose spaces.

styles.title: Polished Concrete:
styles.description: Controlled sheen (matte to high-gloss), premium aesthetics, and high abrasion resistance.

styles.title: Colored / Stained:
styles.description: Custom tones to add warmth and character.

styles.title: Epoxy / Polyaspartic:
styles.description: Chemical and abrasion protection—ideal for hobby areas, gyms, or workshops.

content.description: Pro tip: We can combine a 6.5-bag mix, fiber mesh, and 10-gauge wire mesh (where applicable) for added reinforcement and crack control, along with best-practice sub-base prep and a properly specified vapor barrier.
